action.code: function(){ function c(s){ try{return document.querySelectorAll(s).length;}catch(_){return -1;} } const text=(document.body&&document.body.innerText||'').slice(0,4000); return { phase:'t+4s', url:location.href, title:document.title, ready:document.readyState, counts:{ commentHash:c('#comment li'), idContains:c('[id*=\"comment\"] li'), commentItem:c('.comment-item'), wooInline:c('.woo-box-item-inline'), anyComment:c('[class*=\"comment\" i]') }, hasKeywords:{ pinglun:/评论|comment/i.test(text), zhanKai:/展开|查看更多|更多评论/i.test(text), login:/登录|注册|手机号|验证码/i.test(text) }, textSample:text.slice(0,800) }; }
function(){ const t=Date.now(); while(Date.now()-t<7000){} return { ok:true }; }

function(){ function c(s){ try{return document.querySelectorAll(s).length;}catch(_){return -1;} } const text=(document.body&&document.body.innerText||'').slice(0,5000); return { phase:'t+11s', url:location.href, title:document.title, ready:document.readyState, counts:{ commentHash:c('#comment li'), idContains:c('[id*=\"comment\"] li'), commentItem:c('.comment-item'), wooInline:c('.woo-box-item-inline'), anyComment:c('[class*=\"comment\" i]') }, hasKeywords:{ pinglun:/评论|comment/i.test(text), zhanKai:/展开|查看更多|更多评论/i.test(text), login:/登录|注册|手机号|验证码/i.test(text) }, textSample:text.slice(0,1000) }; }
